items.title: Nonlinear tabular classification
items.description: RBF- or polynomial-kernel SVMs on credit risk, churn, and diagnostic tabular datasets where linear boundaries underfit but deep nets are overkill for sample size.

items.title: Bioinformatics sequence kernels
items.description: Specialized string kernels (e.g. spectrum, mismatch) score similarity between DNA or protein sequences without explicit one-hot expansion of all motifs.

items.title: Kernel PCA and manifold visualization
items.description: RBF kernel PCA unfolds curved low-dimensional structure in genomics or sensor data for exploration before supervised modeling.

items.title: Gaussian processes
items.description: GP regression and classification define priors over functions via kernel K; hyperparameters γ and length scales control smoothness.

items.title: Text with linear kernels on sparse features
items.description: High-dimensional TF-IDF or bag-of-words representations often pair with linear kernels (K = dot product) for fast, strong document classifiers.

items.title: Hybrid pipelines
items.description: Hand-crafted kernels on structured features combined with learned neural embeddings — each path supplies geometry for downstream linear heads or SVMs.
